## Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## ECMA-376 Reference

If applicable, reference the relevant ECMA-376 spec section (e.g., `a:outerShdw` in Part 1, 20.1.8.45).

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples.
